subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! With the ear of thy spirit hearken thou unto the soul-stirring call of the Self-Sufficing One. His Word entereth into prepared hearts and breasts [3.5s]... ...O my God! I entreat Thee by Thy name whereby the hearts of those brought nigh are attracted unto the horizon of Thy Revelation
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احمد آواز جانفزای دوست بینیاز را بگوش جان بشنو کلمه او در قلوب مستعده و افئده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
